title: sesamum lepidotum
intro: Sesamum lepidotum, also known as hairy senna or hairy cassia, is a plant species belonging to the family Fabaceae, commonly found in tropical regions. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include antimalarial, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial activities. Sesamum lepidotum has been used to treat various health conditions, such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, due to its ability to reduce inflammation and promote digestion. Herbal preparations of Sesamum lepidotum include tea, infusion, and decoction, which can be used to alleviate symptoms and support overall health.
